auth_fields.help: Create at https://airtable.com/create/tokens with data.records:read scope (and write if needed).
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

connectors.description: Read and write Airtable bases, tables, and records.
connectors.name: Airtable

tools.description: List the bases the token can access.
tools.name: list_bases

tools.description: List tables and fields in a base.
tools.name: list_tables

tools.description: List records, with view and formula filters.
tools.name: list_records

tools.description: Fetch a single record by ID.
tools.name: get_record

tools.description: Create a record in a table.
tools.name: create_record

tools.description: Update fields on an existing record.
tools.name: update_record

auth_fields.help: Recommended for Data Center 5.5+. Generate in Profile, Personal Access Tokens.
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

auth_fields.help: Use with password if you don't have a PAT.
auth_fields.label: Username

connectors.description: Browse self-hosted Bitbucket repositories, pull requests, and commits (Server / Data Center).
connectors.name: Bitbucket
connectors.notes: Set BITBUCKET_URL and either a token or username+password.

tools.description: List repos in a Bitbucket project.
tools.name: bitbucket_list_repos

tools.description: List a repo's pull requests.
tools.name: bitbucket_list_pull_requests

tools.description: List a repo's recent commits.
tools.name: bitbucket_get_commits

connectors.description: Read-only SQL access to a ClickHouse database over HTTP.
connectors.name: ClickHouse

tools.description: List databases / schemas on the server.
tools.name: list_databases

tools.description: List tables in a database.
tools.name: list_tables

tools.description: Show a table's columns and types.
tools.name: describe_table

tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query (guarded).
tools.name: run_query

tools.description: Show the engine and connection summary.
tools.name: server_info

auth_fields.help: Recommended for Data Center 7.9+. Generate in Profile, Personal Access Tokens.
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

auth_fields.help: Use with password if you don't have a PAT.
auth_fields.label: Username

connectors.description: Search and read self-hosted Confluence pages (Data Center / Server).
connectors.name: Confluence
connectors.notes: Set CONFLUENCE_URL and either a token or username+password.

tools.description: Search Confluence pages with CQL.
tools.name: confluence_search

tools.description: Read a Confluence page by ID.
tools.name: confluence_get_page

tools.description: List accessible Confluence spaces.
tools.name: confluence_list_spaces

auth_fields.help: Recommended for Data Center 7.9+. Generate in Profile, Personal Access Tokens.
auth_fields.label: Personal Access Token

auth_fields.help: Use with password if you don't have a PAT.
auth_fields.label: Username

connectors.description: Search and read self-hosted Jira issues (Data Center / Server).
connectors.name: Jira
connectors.notes: Set JIRA_URL and either a token or username+password.

tools.description: Search Jira issues with JQL.
tools.name: jira_search

tools.description: Read a Jira issue by key.
tools.name: jira_get_issue

tools.description: List Jira projects.
tools.name: jira_list_projects
